# SCORE Licenses and Permits General Education

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, plan-start, formation-and-launch

## Resource purpose
General education on licenses and permits.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when a user asks what permissions, local licenses, permits, or regulatory steps may apply.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Formation and Launch

## Route the user here when
The user is forming or launching and needs to identify possible licensing/permit categories.

## BOSS routing notes
- Do not guarantee compliance requirements; route to official local/state agencies or professionals.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
